about.title: Hey, I'm Mario Cristian.
about.subtitle: I'm a developer with a creative mindset and attention to detail, passionate about uniting clean code with good design.
about.p1: I currently specialize in fullstack development and cybersecurity. I love creating useful, scalable, and visually appealing software. I am always exploring new technologies, coding best practices, and ways to improve user experience.
about.p2: When I'm not coding, I'm probably learning something new, pushing personal projects forward, or sharing knowledge.

whatido.title: What do I do?
whatido.c1_desc: I develop complete web solutions, from the interface to the server. I use modern technologies like Vue, TypeScript, and Node.js to build robust, efficient, and visually appealing systems.
whatido.c2_desc: Good programming also means programming securely. I apply cybersecurity principles from the start of the project, with best practices, validations, and an ethical mindset.
whatido.c3_desc: I focus on creating clean, understandable, and fast interfaces. I always design with the user in mind, aiming for a clear, intuitive, and pleasant experience.
whatido.c4_desc: I don't just develop software: I solve real problems. I enjoy working on projects that help freelancers, small businesses, or personal ideas become useful and scalable solutions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc_grupoclavd_short: Signage and installations company operating nationally and internationally.
projects.desc_grupoclavd_long: Signage and installations company operating nationally and internationally. Website developed with Wix, focused on showcasing visual campaigns, services, and completed installations.
projects.desc_gymlab_short: Progressive Web App (PWA) for gym workout tracking, routine management, and progression.
projects.desc_gymlab_long: Progressive Web App aimed at sports training management. It allows planning routines, logging sets (weight, reps, RIR), and applying the progressive overload principle with an advanced offline data retention system using LocalStorage.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Got a project or just want to say hi?
contact.subtitle_br: Feel free to drop me a message.
